segments.text: Jesus said these things, then lifting up his eyes to heaven, he said,
Father, the time has come. Glorify your Son, that your Son may also glorify you;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: even as you gave him authority over all flesh, so he will give eternal life to all whom you have given him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: This is eternal life, that they should know you, the only true God, and him whom you sent, Jesus Christ.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I glorified you on the earth. I have accomplished the work which you have given me to do.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now, Father, glorify me with your own self with the glory which I had with you before the world existed.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “I revealed your name to the people whom you have given me out of the world. They were yours, and you have given them to me. They have kept your word.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now they have known that all things whatever you have given me are from you,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for the words which you have given me I have given to them; and they received them, and knew for sure that I came from you. They have believed that you sent me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I pray for them. I don’t pray for the world, but for those whom you have given me, for they are yours.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: All things that are mine are yours, and yours are mine, and I am glorified in them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I am no more in the world, but these are in the world, and I am coming to you. Holy Father, keep them through your name which you have given me, that they may be one, even as we are.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: While I was with them in the world, I kept them in your name. I have kept those whom you have given me. None of them is lost except the son of destruction, that the Scripture might be fulfilled.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But now I come to you, and I say these things in the world, that they may have my joy made full in themselves.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I have given them your word. The world hated them because they are not of the world, even as I am not of the world.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I pray not that you would take them from the world, but that you would keep them from the evil one.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They are not of the world, even as I am not of the world.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Sanctify them in your truth. Your word is truth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As you sent me into the world, even so I have sent them into the world.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For their sakes I sanctify myself, that they themselves also may be sanctified in truth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Not for these only do I pray, but for those also who will believe in me through their word,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: that they may all be one; even as you, Father, are in me, and I in you, that they also may be one in us; that the world may believe that you sent me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The glory which you have given me, I have given to them, that they may be one, even as we are one,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I in them, and you in me, that they may be perfected into one, that the world may know that you sent me and loved them, even as you loved me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Father, I desire that they also whom you have given me be with me where I am, that they may see my glory which you have given me, for you loved me before the foundation of the world.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Righteous Father, the world hasn’t known you, but I knew you; and these knew that you sent me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I made known to them your name, and will make it known; that the love with which you loved me may be in them, and I in them.
segments.speaker: Jesus
